ticket_title: Cart displays $0.00 for Device and SIM prices despite backend returning correct pricing

test_cases.name: TC-1: Rep navigates back from add-ons to promotions — cart restores correct device price [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Active new-account activation in progress; device validated; plan and promotions completed; rep is on the add-ons step. | Test Data: New prepaid customer; standard in-stock handset (~$479.99); physical SIM; COR store; no promotions applied.

steps.action: Representative completes device selection, plan configuration, and promotions, then reaches the add-ons step.
Representative taps the back button to return to the promotions step.
Representative proceeds forward to add-ons and continues to the cart.
steps.expected: The cart shows the correct device price and SIM price. Neither item shows $0.00.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Rep navigates back two steps — pricing remains stable throughout [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Active new-account activation; device validated; plan, protection, and promotions all configured. | Test Data: New prepaid customer; handset and SIM from dealer stock; COR store; rep navigates back from add-ons to plan step.

steps.action: Representative completes the full flow through add-ons.
Representative navigates back two steps to the plan selection screen.
Representative proceeds forward back through each step to the cart.
steps.expected: Device and SIM prices are correct at every step forward and in the final cart. No $0.00 appears at any point.

test_cases.name: TC-3: Standard activation with no backward navigation completes with correct pricing (regression) [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Clean new-account activation. | Test Data: New prepaid customer; standard handset; COR store; forward-only navigation through all steps.

steps.action: Representative completes the full activation flow from device scan to cart without navigating back.
Representative reviews the cart and confirms all line item prices.
steps.expected: Device and SIM prices are correct. No regression introduced by this fix.

test_cases.name: TC-4: Multi-line order with back-navigation on one line — sibling lines unaffected [Priority: Medium]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Multi-line new-account order; first line fully activated; second line in progress at add-ons. | Test Data: Two-line order; two different handsets; COR store; rep navigates back on line 2 only.

steps.action: Representative activates line 1 and starts adding line 2.
Representative navigates backward on line 2 from add-ons to promotions, then proceeds forward.
Representative reviews the cart showing both lines.
steps.expected: Line 2 shows the correct device price after back-navigation. Line 1 pricing is unchanged.

test_cases.name: TC-5: Rep completes payment after back-navigation — receipt shows correct charges [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Activation in progress; rep navigated back at least once during the flow. | Test Data: New prepaid customer; mid-range handset ~$479.99 + tax; COR store.

steps.action: Representative navigates backward at least once during the activation flow.
Representative proceeds forward and completes payment.
Representative reviews the on-screen and printed receipt.
steps.expected: Receipt reflects the full correct device price and tax amount. The amount charged matches the displayed cart total.
